1.title: Recent Worker Process Failures
1.query:
timeseries RecentWorkerProcessFailures = avg(iis.APPPOOLWAS.RecentWorkerProcessFailures),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(RecentWorkerProcessFailures) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Total Worker Process Failures
2.query:
timeseries TotalWorkerProcessFailures = avg(iis.APPPOOLWAS.TotalWorkerProcessFailures),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(TotalWorkerProcessFailures) desc
| limit 20
